name: Laevateinn Full
description: Laevateinn, meaning 'damage twig' or 'wand of harm,' is a legendary weapon mentioned in Norse mythology. While its exact form and capabilities are debated, it is generally depicted as a powerful and dangerous artifact. In the poem Fjölsvinnsmál, Laevateinn is described as being forged by the cunning smith Völundr (Wayland the Smith). Völundr hid the weapon in a chest on the island of Lyngvi, guarded by the watchful rooster Víðópnir, perched atop the Læraðr tree (often associated with Yggdrasil). The poem details the complex ritual required to obtain Laevateinn, involving specific tools and knowledge. Laevateinn is not explicitly used by any specific god or hero in the surviving Norse texts, but its existence highlights the Norse fascination with powerful, magically crafted weapons. Some interpretations suggest it is a symbol of the dangers of unchecked power or the destructive potential of knowledge. The 'Full' designation in the name implies a complete or perfected version of the weapon, potentially possessing enhanced capabilities compared to a simpler Laevateinn. Its significance lies in its representation of the skill of the dwarven smiths and the hidden, potent magic woven into the fabric of the Norse cosmos. The weapon's guarded location further emphasizes its dangerous nature, suggesting it is not meant for just anyone to wield. The difficulty in retrieving it underscores the respect with which powerful magic and weaponry were regarded in Norse society. It is a reminder that even crafted objects could possess immense power and require great care and respect.
subtitle: The Damage Twig of Volundr
material: Unknown metal, possibly imbued with magic
origin: Forged by the smith Völundr (Wayland the Smith)
currentLocation: Hidden chest on the island of Lyngvi, guarded by Víðópnir

keyMyths.title: Fjölsvinnsmál Mention
keyMyths.description: The poem Fjölsvinnsmál describes Laevateinn's creation by Völundr and its guarded location, detailing the ritual to obtain it.

keyMyths.title: Völundr's Craft
keyMyths.description: Laevateinn is a testament to Völundr's skill as a smith, showcasing the potential for magical weaponry in Norse lore.
